panels.title: Token Split by Model
panels.description: Proportion of tokens consumed by each Claude model. Shows whether you're using Opus, Sonnet, or Haiku more.

targets.rawSql: SELECT t.model, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND t.model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.model ORDER BY total_tokens DESC

panels.title: Model Usage Over Time
panels.description: Daily token consumption stacked by model. Reveals shifts in model usage patterns.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp) AS time, t.model, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND t.model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Model Per Project
panels.description: Which models are used in which projects. Useful for identifying projects that rely on more expensive models.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.project, t.model, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND t.model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY tokens DESC

panels.title: Subagent vs Main
panels.description: Token consumption split between main sessions and subagents. High subagent usage indicates heavy parallel/delegated work.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN s.is_subagent THEN 'Subagent' ELSE 'Main' END AS session_type, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1
